nodes.long_description:
Welcome to the year 2045 in the United States, during which the last two decades have witnessed a transformation in human life through cutting-edge technologies. 

*FEATURES*

- Improve your abilities with various cyber implants.
- Physics-based interactions between players, enemies and weapons.
- Full-body player character;
- Each game level is unique;
- Possibility to upgrade any weapon.

A groundbreaking innovation in military technology is cybernetic prosthetics – AKA turning ordinary individuals into super soldiers, greatly enhancing their battlefield effectiveness.

Yet in truth, the most powerful prostheses are linked to the lab's global artificial intelligence, aiding soldiers in utilizing their enhanced capabilities on the battlefield and assisting scientists with their goal of developing new prosthetic technologies.

Unfortunately, playing “God” has consequences. Problems arise within Horizon Lab when the lab's AI goes rogue, seizing control of all implant wearers it can influence, essentially turning them into obedient zombies!

The company's board of directors chooses to conceal the fact that they've lost control of the laboratory from all customers. Consequently, the lab continues to operate and produce prosthetics, with the only question being how to retrieve them.

To address this challenge, the company hires "team managers," unskilled employees dispatched to the lab to collect prosthetics, akin to mushroom foraging.

Congratulations, you are now a new team manager. Welcome aboard!
nodes.short_description:
Roguelike, physics-based, full-body FPS with randomly generated levels. 

One impressive standout feature of the game is each player's ability to customize specific body parts (such as hands) to gain unique skills within the game itself.

*FEATURES*

- Improve your abilities with various cyber implants.
- Physics-based interactions between players, enemies, weapons, and the game environment.
- Full-body player character;
- Each game level is unique;
- Possibility to upgrade any weapon.

nodes.change_log:
Version 0.3.2

- Added new cyberimplant "Blades"
- Added Achievements to the game
- Additional improvements and bug fixes

Version 0.3.0. October 9, 2024.

Fixes:

- Fixed a bug with game progress after reaching the 20th level.
- Fixed jittery hand movements during smooth turns.
- Fixed a rare bug where damage from certain weapon types wasn't counted.

Improvements:

- Added the option to adjust player height in the game menu and after starting each level.

If you encounter any bugs or have ideas on how we can improve the game, please let us know at info@dream-dev.com.

Thanks!
---

Major Update Highlights. Version 0.2.8. October 3, 2024:

Added Features:

- New Missions: Dive into fresh, exciting challenges with completely redesigned missions for a more engaging experience.
- New Weapons: Equip yourself with the powerful Burst Rifle and deadly Revolver.
- Brand New Game Level: Take on fresh challenges in a redesigned level layout.
- New Enemy – The Crawler: Face off against a fearsome new adversary.
- Collectibles Added: Hunt for hidden items to learn more about the game world.
- Realtime Shadows on Quest 3, 3S: Added realtime dynamic shadows for the main elements of the game environment, enhancing visual depth and realism (exclusive to Quest 3 and 3S).
- New Sounds: Enjoy a richer audio experience with newly added sounds.
- Reflections and Highlights on Quest 3, 3S: Enhanced reflections and visual highlights for Quest 3 and Quest 3S users.

Improvements:

- Enhanced Graphics & Visual Effects: Experience sharper visuals and stunning effects.
- First Level Overhaul: Redesigned and optimized for a more immersive experience.
- Texture Quality Upgrade: Significantly improved texture details across the game.
- Character Movement Overhaul: Smoother and more responsive character movements.
- Increased Player Speed: Boosted movement speed for a faster-paced experience.
- Mob Behavior Revamp: Improved AI and behavior for enemies.
UI Redesign: Revamped user interface for better accessibility and clarity.
- Memory Usage Optimization: Improved memory management for enhanced performance.
- Significant Gameplay Smoothness Improvements: Achieved much smoother gameplay overall.
- Improved Level Transitions: Smoother transitions between levels for better continuity.
- Resource Caching Enhancements: Optimized resource caching for faster loading and better performance.
- Katana Combat Revamp: Completely reworked for more fluid and responsive melee action.
- Main Character Redesign: A fresh look and feel for your hero.
- Rebalanced Weapon Stats and Prices: Fine-tuned weapon characteristics and pricing for better balance.
- Improved FPS Stability: Smoother performance across all devices.

Bug Fixes:

- Gun Mechanism Bug Fixes: Resolved issues with gun bolt mechanics.
- Various Bug Fixes: Addressed multiple bugs to improve stability and gameplay.

If you find any bugs or have ideas on how we can improve the game, please contact us at info@dream-dev.com. Thank you!
